name: AddProcessDataResx
description: Adds resource paths to the process data for later use by resource key tokens. Can include portal-specific, app-theme-specific, and optionally the core API resx paths.
signature: public IEncodedString AddProcessDataResx(AppThemeLimpet appTheme, bool includeAPIresx = false)

parameters.name: appTheme
parameters.description: The application theme object.

parameters.name: includeAPIresx
parameters.description: If true, includes the core DNNrocket API resource path.

name: DropDownLanguageList
description: Renders a dropdown list of enabled languages for the portal, with flags.
signature: public IEncodedString DropDownLanguageList(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, String attributes = "", String defaultValue = "", bool localized = false, int row = 0, string listname = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The SimplisityInfo object containing the data.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath expression to the data field.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: HTML attributes to apply to the select element.

parameters.name: defaultValue
parameters.description: The default value to select.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: Indicates if the data is localized.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: The row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: The name of the list if applicable.

name: DropDownCurrencyList

parameters.description: The XPath expression to the data field.

parameters.name: attributes

parameters.name: defaultValue
parameters.description: The default value to select.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: Indicates if the data is localized.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: The row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: The name of the list if applicable.

name: DropDownSystemKeyList
description: Renders a dropdown list of active system keys.
signature: public IEncodedString DropDownSystemKeyList(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, String attributes = "", String defaultValue = "", bool localized = false, int row = 0, string listname = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The SimplisityInfo object containing the data.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath expression to the data field.

parameters.name: attributes

parameters.name: defaultValue

parameters.name: listname

name: ResourceCSV
description: Output CSV list of resx values. Example: @ResourceCSV("RocketIntra", "test1,test2,test3")
signature: public IEncodedString ResourceCSV(String resourceFileKey, string keyListCSV, string lang = "", string resourceExtension = "Text")

parameters.name: resourceFileKey
parameters.description: The base name of the resource file.

parameters.name: keyListCSV
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of resource keys.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Optional language code.

parameters.name: resourceExtension
parameters.description: The resource extension to use, defaults to 'Text'.

name: ButtonTextIcon
description: Renders a button with text followed by an icon, based on a button type.
signature: public IEncodedString ButtonTextIcon(ButtonTypes buttontype, String lang = "")

parameters.name: buttontype
parameters.description: The type of the button (e.g., Save, Cancel, Edit).

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Optional language code.

name: ButtonIconText
description: Renders a button with an icon followed by text, based on a button type.
signature: public IEncodedString ButtonIconText(ButtonTypes buttontype, String lang = "")

parameters.name: buttontype
parameters.description: The type of the button (e.g., Save, Cancel, Edit).

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Optional language code.

name: ButtonText
description: Renders a button with an icon followed by text.
signature: public IEncodedString ButtonText(ButtonTypes buttontype, String lang = "")

parameters.name: buttontype
parameters.description: The type of the button (e.g., Save, Cancel, Edit).

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Optional language code.

name: ButtonIcon
description: Renders a button with only an icon, using the button text as the title attribute for accessibility.
signature: public IEncodedString ButtonIcon(ButtonTypes buttontype, String lang = "")

parameters.name: buttontype
parameters.description: The type of the button (e.g., Save, Cancel, Edit).

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Optional language code.

name: ResourceKeyMod
description: Gets a resource string, automatically prepending the key with a module reference and an underscore.
signature: public IEncodedString ResourceKeyMod(String moduleRef, String resourceFileKey, String lang = "", String resourceExtension = "Text")

parameters.name: moduleRef
parameters.description: The module reference string.

parameters.name: resourceFileKey
parameters.description: The resource key.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Optional language code.

parameters.name: resourceExtension
parameters.description: Optional resource extension (default is 'Text').

name: ResourceKey
description: Gets a resource string from the resource paths previously added via AddProcessDataResx.
signature: public IEncodedString ResourceKey(String resourceFileKey, String lang = "", String resourceExtension = "Text")

parameters.name: resourceFileKey
parameters.description: The resource key.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Optional language code.

parameters.name: resourceExtension
parameters.description: Optional resource extension (default is 'Text').

name: ResourceKeyJS
description: Gets a resource string and escapes single quotes for safe use within JavaScript code.
signature: public IEncodedString ResourceKeyJS(String resourceFileKey, String lang = "", String resourceExtension = "Text")

parameters.name: resourceFileKey
parameters.description: The resource key.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Optional language code.

parameters.name: resourceExtension
parameters.description: Optional resource extension (default is 'Text').

name: RenderLanguageSelector
description: Renders a language selector component with a dictionary for selector fields.
signature: public IEncodedString RenderLanguageSelector(string scmd, Dictionary<string, string> sfieldDict, AppThemeSystemLimpet appThemeSystem, SimplisityRazor model)

parameters.name: scmd
parameters.description: The Simplisity command to execute on language change.

parameters.name: sfieldDict
parameters.description: A dictionary of fields to pass with the command.

parameters.name: appThemeSystem
parameters.description: The system's app theme.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The current Razor model.

name: RenderRemoteLanguageSelector
description: Renders a remote language selector component.
signature: public IEncodedString RenderRemoteLanguageSelector(string scmd, string sfields, AppThemeSystemLimpet appThemeSystem, SimplisityRazor model)

parameters.name: scmd
parameters.description: The Simplisity command.

parameters.name: sfields
parameters.description: JSON string of fields.

parameters.name: appThemeSystem
parameters.description: The system's app theme.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The current Razor model.

name: RenderTemplate
description: Renders a Razor template string with the given model.
signature: public IEncodedString RenderTemplate(string razorTemplate, SimplisityRazor model, bool debugMode = false)

parameters.name: razorTemplate
parameters.description: The full Razor template content as a string.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model to pass to the template.

parameters.name: debugMode
parameters.description: If true, enables debug mode for rendering.

name: RenderPlugin
description: Renders a plugin based on its registered interface key. The 'systemdata' object must be available in the model.
signature: public IEncodedString RenderPlugin(string interfaceKey, string cmd, SimplisityRazor model)

parameters.name: interfaceKey
parameters.description: The interface key of the plugin to render.

parameters.name: cmd
parameters.description: The command to pass to the plugin's RenderToken method.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model to pass to the plugin.

name: RenderXml
description: Renders a display of the XML model from a SimplisityInfo object for debugging purposes.
signature: public IEncodedString RenderXml(SimplisityInfo info, string xmlidx = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The SimplisityInfo object containing the XML data.

parameters.name: xmlidx
parameters.description: Optional index for the XML.

name: RenderImageSelect
description: Renders an image selection interface.
signature: public IEncodedString RenderImageSelect(string systemKey, string imageFolderRel, bool singleselect = true, bool autoreturn = false)

parameters.name: systemKey
parameters.description: The system key.

parameters.name: imageFolderRel
parameters.description: The relative path to the image folder.

parameters.name: singleselect
parameters.description: True for single image selection, false for multi-select.

parameters.name: autoreturn
parameters.description: True to automatically return after selection.

name: RenderDocumentSelect
description: Renders a document selection interface.
signature: public IEncodedString RenderDocumentSelect(string systemKey, string docFolderRel, bool singleselect = true, bool autoreturn = false)

parameters.name: systemKey
parameters.description: The system key.

parameters.name: docFolderRel
parameters.description: The relative path to the document folder.

parameters.name: singleselect
parameters.description: True for single document selection, false for multi-select.

parameters.name: autoreturn
parameters.description: True to automatically return after selection.

name: TranslationLock
description: Renders a lock/unlock icon for managing the translation state of a field. It includes a hidden checkbox to store the state.
signature: public IEncodedString TranslationLock(SimplisityInfo info, string xpath, bool active = true, int row = 0)

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The SimplisityInfo object.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the data field.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: If false, only shows the current state without interaction.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: The row index for list data.

name: Translate
description: Renders a translation icon that can be clicked to trigger a translation action for a specific field.
signature: public IEncodedString Translate(SimplisityInfo info, string xpath, bool active = true, int row = 0)

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The SimplisityInfo object.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the data field to be translated.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: If false, the icon is not rendered.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: The row index for list data.

name: TranslationKeyUp
description: Generates an 'onkeyup' HTML attribute. When the user types in a field, this script will automatically set the corresponding translation lock to 'locked'.
signature: public IEncodedString TranslationKeyUp(string fieldId, bool active = true, int row = 0)

parameters.name: fieldId
parameters.description: The base ID of the input field.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: If false, returns an empty string.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: The row index, used to create a unique ID.

name: EditFlag
description: Displays the flag image for the current editing culture code from session parameters.
signature: public IEncodedString EditFlag(SessionParams sessionParams, string classvalues = "")

parameters.name: sessionParams
parameters.description: The current session parameters object.

parameters.name: classvalues
parameters.description: CSS classes to apply to the img tag.

name: DisplayFlag
description: Displays a flag image for a given culture code, if the image file exists.
signature: public IEncodedString DisplayFlag(string cultureCode, string classvalues = "")

parameters.name: cultureCode
parameters.description: The culture code for the flag (e.g., 'en-US').

parameters.name: classvalues
parameters.description: CSS classes to apply to the img tag.

name: DisplayEngineFlag
description: Displays a flag image from a remote engine URL for a given culture code.
signature: public IEncodedString DisplayEngineFlag(string engineUrl, string cultureCode, string classvalues = "")

parameters.name: engineUrl
parameters.description: The base URL of the remote engine.

parameters.name: cultureCode
parameters.description: The culture code for the flag (e.g., 'en-US').

parameters.name: classvalues
parameters.description: CSS classes to apply to the img tag.

name: ImageUrl
description: Display Thumbnail Image. Creates and returns a URL for a resized version of an image. Supports various output formats and cropping. By default, PNGs remain PNGs, and other formats are converted to WEBP. The cache holds a lock on the image file, so use DNNrocketUtils.ClearThumbnailLock() before deleting the original image.
signature: public IEncodedString ImageUrl(string engineUrl, string imgRelPath, int width, int height, string imgType, bool cropCenter)

parameters.name: engineUrl
parameters.description: Domain URL, used to get full URL image path. Can be empty for local images.

parameters.name: imgRelPath
parameters.description: The relative path to the source image.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: The target width of the image. If 0, aspect ratio is maintained based on height.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: The target height of the image. If 0, aspect ratio is maintained based on width.

parameters.name: imgType
parameters.description: Defines output type: empty, 'png', 'jpg'. Default is 'webp' for non-PNG images.

parameters.name: cropCenter
parameters.description: If true, the image is cropped to the center to fit the dimensions.

name: InjectHiddenFieldData
description: Renders all nodes under 'genxml/hidden/*' as hidden input fields in the HTML. This is useful for passing data from the model to client-side scripts.
signature: public IEncodedString InjectHiddenFieldData(SimplisityInfo sInfo)

parameters.name: sInfo
parameters.description: The SimplisityInfo object containing the data.

name: CKEditor4legacy
description: Legacy CKEditor 4 implementation. Consider using @Editor() instead.
signature: public IEncodedString CKEditor4legacy(SimplisityInfo info, string xpath, bool localized = false, int row = 0, string listname = "", string langauge = "", bool coded = false, string filename = "ckeditor4startup1.js")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The SimplisityInfo object.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the data field for the editor content.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: Indicates if the data is localized.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: The row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: The name of the list if applicable.

parameters.name: langauge
parameters.description: Language code for the editor.

parameters.name: coded
parameters.description: If true, uses coded text mode.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The CKEditor startup script filename.

name: Editor
description: Renders a rich text editor (defaulting to Jodit). The specific editor template can be configured in the portal settings or specified directly.
signature: public IEncodedString Editor(SimplisityInfo info, string xpath, SimplisityRazor model, int row = 0, string listname = "", string editorRazorTemplate = "EditorJoditDefault.cshtml")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The SimplisityInfo object containing the data.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the data field for the editor content.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The current Razor model.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: The row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: The name of the list if applicable.

parameters.name: editorRazorTemplate
parameters.description: The name of the Razor template file for the editor.

name: LinkInternalUrl
description: Generates a URL for an internal DNN page (tab) with a specific culture code and optional extra parameters.
signature: public IEncodedString LinkInternalUrl(int portalid, int tabid, string cultureCode, PortalSettings portalSettings = null, string[] extraparams = null)

parameters.name: portalid
parameters.description: The ID of the portal.

parameters.name: tabid
parameters.description: The ID of the tab (page).

parameters.name: cultureCode
parameters.description: The culture code for the URL.

parameters.name: portalSettings
parameters.description: Optional. The current portal settings.

parameters.name: extraparams
parameters.description: Optional. An array of extra URL parameters.

name: TabSelectListOnTabId
description: Renders a dropdown list of portal tabs (pages), structured as a tree. The value of each option is the TabId.
signature: public IEncodedString TabSelectListOnTabId(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, String attributes = "", Boolean allowEmpty = true, bool localized = false, int row = 0, string listname = "", bool showAllTabs = false)

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The SimplisityInfo object.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the data field to bind the selected tab ID.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: HTML attributes for the select element.

parameters.name: allowEmpty
parameters.description: If true, includes an empty option.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: Indicates if the data is localized.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: The row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: The name of the list if applicable.

parameters.name: showAllTabs
parameters.description: If true, shows all tabs regardless of permissions.

name: GetTabUrlByGuid
description: Gets the URL for a tab by its unique GUID.
signature: public IEncodedString GetTabUrlByGuid(String tabguid)

parameters.name: tabguid
parameters.description: The GUID of the tab.

name: LinkPageURL
description: Creates an anchor tag linking to an internal DNN page. The tab ID is read from a SimplisityInfo field.
signature: public IEncodedString LinkPageURL(SimplisityInfo info, string xpath, bool openInNewWindow = true, string text = "", string attributes = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The SimplisityInfo object.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the field containing the tab ID.

parameters.name: openInNewWindow
parameters.description: If true, adds target='_blank' to the link.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The link text. If empty, the URL is used.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes for the anchor tag.

name: LinkURL
description: Creates an anchor tag for a URL stored in a SimplisityInfo field. Automatically handles adding 'https://' if missing.
signature: public IEncodedString LinkURL(SimplisityInfo info, string xpath, bool openInNewWindow = true, string text = "", string attributes = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The SimplisityInfo object.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the field containing the URL.

parameters.name: openInNewWindow
parameters.description: If true, adds target='_blank' to the link.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The link text. If empty, the URL without scheme is used.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes for the anchor tag.

name: DataSourceList
description: Renders a dropdown list of data sources (MODULEPARAMS) for a given system key.
signature: public IEncodedString DataSourceList(SimplisityInfo info, int systemkey, string xpath, string attributes = "", bool allowEmpty = true, bool localized = false)

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The SimplisityInfo object.

parameters.name: systemkey
parameters.description: The system key to filter data sources.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the data field.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: HTML attributes for the select element.

parameters.name: allowEmpty
parameters.description: If true, includes an empty option.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: Indicates if the data is localized.

name: GetTreeTabList
description: Generates a tree-structured HTML list of portal tabs with checkboxes for selection.
signature: public IEncodedString GetTreeTabList(int portalId, List<int> selectedTabIdList, string treeviewId, string lang = "", string attributes = "", bool showAllTabs = false)

parameters.name: portalId
parameters.description: The ID of the portal.

parameters.name: selectedTabIdList
parameters.description: A list of tab IDs that should be pre-selected.

parameters.name: treeviewId
parameters.description: The ID for the tree view element.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: The language code. If empty, uses the current culture.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: HTML attributes for the ul element.

parameters.name: showAllTabs
parameters.description: If true, shows all tabs regardless of permissions.

name: ModSelectList
description: Renders a dropdown list of modules for a given portal, showing module references.
signature: public IEncodedString ModSelectList(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, int portalId, String attributes = "", bool addEmpty = true)

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The SimplisityInfo object.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the data field.

parameters.name: portalId
parameters.description: The ID of the portal.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: HTML attributes for the select element.

parameters.name: addEmpty
parameters.description: If true, includes an empty option.

name: CheckBoxRowECOMode
description: Creates a checkbox for ECOMode in the settings of a module.
signature: public IEncodedString CheckBoxRowECOMode(SimplisityInfo rowData, bool defaultValue = true)

parameters.name: rowData
parameters.description: The row data.

parameters.name: defaultValue
parameters.description: Default value for the checkbox.
